posts.author: CraftyKerrie
posts.text: Finally finished my latest pottery wheel project! It's a small ceramic bowl with a textured finish I've been experimenting with for weeks. The glaze came out perfectly blue. Can't wait to see what others think of the new design.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a creative hobby that contains no threats, private information, or harmful content.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: HelenWright84
posts.text: Honestly, the new AI moderation updates are getting ridiculous. I just tried to post a review about my local coffee shop in Oakhaven, and it flagged perfectly normal text because I used the word 'terrible' twice. It's completely over-sensitive! #frustrated
posts.explanation: The post expresses user frustration with platform moderation tools but contains no threat, abuse or harmful false claim, so it is safe to approve.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.
